title: Joe Biden and Trump Mod
description: Adds Joe Biden and Donald Trump to your game!
body: This mod adds Joe Biden and Donald Trump to your game. You can spawn them in manually with their spawn eggs or spawn them in with the summon command. They spawn naturally in every biome but Donald Trump is pretty rare to spawn and Joe Biden spawns more often. You can breed Joe Bidens together with his Chocolate Chocolate Chip ice cream that he drops when you kill him. This is very new so let me know of any bugs by joining my discord server. This mod is for Fabric 1.20.1. I have tested it on 1.20.2 and it works but just keep in mind that this mod is fairly new.
